From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

**[Henschel](/wiki/Henschel "Henschel")** most commonly refers to Henschel & Son, a former German manufacturer.

**Henschel** may also refer to:

## People

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Henschel_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: People")]

* [Henschel (surname)](/wiki/Henschel_(surname) "Henschel (surname)")

## See also

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Henschel_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: See also")]

* [Henschel Quartet](/wiki/Henschel_Quartet "Henschel Quartet"), a German String Quartet comprising the three Henschel siblings and cellist Mathias Beyer-Karlshøj, who joined them in 1994
* [Thyssen-Henschel](/wiki/Thyssen-Henschel "Thyssen-Henschel"), successor to Henschel & Son; industrial and defense contractor; since 1999 part of Rheinmetall Landsysteme GmbH
* *[Drayman Henschel](/wiki/Drayman_Henschel "Drayman Henschel")*, an 1898 play by the German playwright Gerhart Hauptmann
